input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.3.2.6
            TITLE: the steering rack must be mechanically attached to the chassis  f.5.14

            CONTENT:
            rule V.3.2.6: The steering rack must be mechanically attached to the Chassis  F.5.14
V.3.2.6 The steering rack must be mechanically attached to the Chassis  F.5.14

final_answer: The steering rack must be mechanically attached to the Chassis
